rationale: Review 2 uniquely identifies that ReductiveGroup and SemisimpleGroup with only `True` fields are semantically empty typeclasses (any AffineAlgGroup trivially satisfies both), which is the most material API-design flaw confirmed directly in the diff; Review 1 catches more findings but its unique ones (redundant instance, naming, @[simp]) are less architecturally consequential than this collapsed typeclass hierarchy.
